title: QUOTE function doesn't work as expected on tables that are utf16
key_bug_features: QUOTE function fails on utf16 charset tables
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE UTF16_TABLE_2 (COLUMN1 varchar(32) DEFAULT NULL, COLUMN2 int NOT NULL) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf16;
SELECT QUOTE(COLUMN1), COLUMN2 FROM UTF16_TABLE_2 WHERE COLUMN2 > 0;
CREATE TABLE UTF16_TABLE_3 (COLUMN1 varchar(32) DEFAULT NULL, COLUMN2 varchar(32) DEFAULT NULL) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf16;
